---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What are you trying to do, and where does the current tool fall short?

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to see. Sketch the tool/CLI/dashboard surface if you can.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about and why they fall short.

## Invariants

Does this interact with the project's invariants (dashboard read APIs are
read-only; archive is a soft local status update; acceptance gates; no secrets
in payloads)? Note how the proposal preserves them.

## Additional context

Links, prior art, or screenshots.
